source: Flightradar24 API reference tracks, transformed to DXB Unreal runway coordinates
note: Real reference track shapes are used as the map. Tracks are rotated per flight so the takeoff/landing tangent aligns to the supplied Unreal runway direction. Clean runway ground paths are added with small offsets. Smoothed version: airborne XY/Z points were low-pass smoothed to reduce zig-zag noise while preserving runway anchors, timings, IDs, and point counts.
